## Security Checklist

- [ ] No tokens, cookies, `.env` files, private keys, or certificates were committed
- [ ] No unpublished personal data or sensitive raw materials were added
- [ ] New examples are already public, approved for sharing, or de-identified
- [ ] No new GitHub Actions or external automations were added without reviewing permissions
- [ ] If scripts or commands changed, file paths and command examples were reviewed for safety
